assets.name: Cricket ball YOLOv8 public baseline
assets.note: Single-class cricket ball detector for immediate pipeline testing; not enough by itself for LBW decisions.

assets.name: Cricket Ball Dataset for YOLO
assets.note: 1778 annotated YOLOv8 images, CC0/Public Domain. Use Kaggle credentials to download.

assets.name: Roboflow Cricket Ball Tracking DATASET
assets.note: Large public tracking/detection dataset family; verify license/API key before training.
